fields.title: Migrate terminal-prompt/ feature
fields.description:
Move terminal-prompt to tau/src/terminal-prompt/

## Source
- extensions/tau/src/terminal-prompt.ts

## Target
- extensions/tau/src/terminal-prompt/index.ts

## Changes
- Export initTerminalPrompt(pi, state) function
- Export wrapEditorRender() for TauEditor
- Read enabled state from shared state
- Remove registerEditorPlugin calls
- Keep /tau command for toggling

## DoD
- Terminal prompt styling works
- /tau prompt on|off|toggle works
- State persists across sessions
fields.close_reason: Moved terminal-prompt into tau vertical slice and exposed wrapEditorRender; state stored in tau shared state
